Added parse_time memoization cache to schedule.lua with 100-entry limit. Caches both valid results and nil for invalid inputs. Also included KeenNova's MINUTES_PER_DAY=1440 constant extraction. All 21 tests pass (18 existing + 3 new cache tests).
